description: Use NVDA+Control+Shift+B to report Bluetooth device battery levels.
changelog: Changed the hotkey to NVDA+Shift+Ctrl+B to avoid possible conflicts, and added a Bluetooth Battery Report category in NVDA Settings with an option to filter devices by connection type.

translations.description: 使用 NVDA+Control+Shift+B 播报蓝牙设备电量。
translations.changelog: 将播报热键改为 NVDA+Shift+Ctrl+B，以避免可能的热键冲突。并在 NVDA 设置中新增 Bluetooth Battery Report 分类，提供按连接类型过滤设备的选项。
